  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Lockout/tagout device applied incorrectly: lock applied without an accompanying tag, or tag applied without an accompanying lock."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all work immediately.",
    "Apply both a standardized lock and a highly visible warning tag to the energy isolating device.",
    "Verify zero energy state before resuming any service or maintenance work."
  ],
  "rationale": "Under OSHA 1910.147, lockout and tagout devices must be used together to ensure full employee protection unless the employer can demonstrate full compliance with the tagout-only provisions. In a residential service call context, applying a lock without a tag (or vice versa) fails to communicate who is working on the circuit and when it is safe to re-energize, creating a high-risk hazard.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(4)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(5)",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d)"
  ]
}
